A Gift in Words 🎂

For Kamo — ka lerato la Morena!

this picture is lowkey funny shem btw😭😭

Oh my dayys😭, literally so unhinged and the best part is the smiles of unforced conversations, and how we were always eating? 😭 Or how we would walk soooo much as though arena di room banna.

Nevertheless, the greatest memories are the ones we weren't planning but the ones where we were just together and having unserious talks. Or even how we underestimated ourselves?

It is beautiful the fact that today we're becoming women we dreamt of? But it is no longer a dream because we are the dream now — period.

01 / 04

Probably crying right now 🥺

Probably the part where i will be crying because yes ngiyalila no jokes 😭 Thanks be to God because i used to thug this out but today this is one way i express myself, tears and weeping.

I remember how i would always look at this picture and see your smile and be at peace with knowing you can smile in my presence without fear of anything?

But today the picture has more meaning, a "thank you Jesus!" moment everytime i look at it, why? Because i realised how much of a gift you are not only to me, but to your proximity in totality.

This is the moment i knew that if i was to be asked, "why are you guys friends?", or "what do you love most about Kamo?" my answer will always not be words, but just a mere HER, because that is who i have come to love and appreciate — just you being you, not the perceptions not the expectations, but the original and now being sanctified creation that you were always and will always be. 🥺🩹

02 / 04

2× Cum Laude 🔥

Ke thome kae nna — chommie ya 2X Cum Laude graduate 🔥 It is not only something that i celebrate, but it touches the depth of knowing that determination, hard work and definitely not fearing missing out — just knowing and setting minds more on what is good and beneficial.

Like Corinthians says, rather than what Ecclesiastes warns about — wasting our youth away. It is phenomenal to finally see you seeing the absolute potential and unique mind that you have, and I am just here for it!!

And when i remember the great commission, this is an area where God has placed you to be a light and salt right now — the tech industry. I am not preaching 😂 BUT, i definitely see you glorifying our Father through obedience, character, and upholding Him over all else.

I wish you only success — and yeah reye di vacation (you're paying sister 😌).

03 / 04
✝️

A Blessing Over You

Today i only have one plea since our Father has blessed our friendship —

I pray He blesses us, and keeps us,

I pray He make His face shine upon us, and be gracious to us,

I pray He turns His face toward us, and give us peace,

Shalom Shalom

Nothing more nothing less, just that Jesus Himself is the center of everything — and may we walk according to His commands and not our own standards.

Happy birthday sthandwa sam 💗🤗

04 / 04
